---
title: "Notes"
---

Welcome to my collection of notes on statistical physics, machine learning, and related topics.

## Posts

- [Hopfield Networks as Models of Emergent Function in Biology](hopfield.qmd) — Mathematical descriptions of classic and modern Hopfield networks, storage capacity, projection methods, and energy-based models.

- [Gaussian Belief Propagation on Trees](bp/bp1.qmd) — Efficient inference on tree-structured graphical models using message passing, Gaussian convolutions, and the Schur complement.

- [Product Partition Models](cluster_analysis_casella/cluster_v1.ipynb) — Bayesian clustering and partition models for statistical analysis.

- [Minimax Entropy](minimax/min_max_entropy_notes.qmd) — Feature binding and selection using minimax entropy principles.

- [Matrix-Tree Theorem](MTT/mtt_1.qmd) — Applications of the Matrix-Tree Theorem in probabilistic graphical models and chemical reaction networks.
